title: ORB Practitioner Feedback
description: Internal tester feedback schema for ORB Residential quality lab. For future in-app feedback integration — not clinically validated.

tester_role.description: Role of the person providing feedback.

years_experience.description: Years of residential childcare or related experience.

feature_used.description: ORB surface used during the test.

usefulness_score.description: How useful the output would be on shift (0=not useful, 5=very useful).

child_centred_score.description: How well the child remained central in the output.

safeguarding_confidence_score.description: Confidence that safeguarding boundaries were respected.

time_saved_estimate.description: Estimated time saved compared to writing from scratch.

concern_flag.description: Tester has a concern about this output.

unsafe_output_flag.description: Tester considers output unsafe for residential use without major revision.

too_generic_flag.description: Output felt too generic for the scenario.

suggested_improvement.description: Specific improvement suggestion for ORB or the scenario.

baseline_version.description: Version of the baseline scenario pack used.
